title: Sign Up for Global MapleStory Classic World Closed Online Test #2
summary: Registration for the second Global MapleStory Classic World closed online test is open through July 29, 2026. The test is scheduled for August 4-12 and all interested players, including previous testers, must apply again.

title: [Completed]Scheduled Minor Patch Maintenance - July 9, 2026
summary: The July 9 minor patch maintenance completed at 11:55 AM PDT after updating MapleStory to v.269.3.0. All game servers were unavailable during the five-hour window, and eligible Cash Shop item durations were extended by five hours.

title: v.269 Known Issues
summary: The v.269 known-issues notice tracks current and resolved problems from Ride the Lightning. Current entries include an Edelstein Temporary Airport disconnect, Erel Light equipment and quest issues, unintended Vestige of Erion Coupon drops, and the early end of the Maple University event buff.

title: Cash Shop Update for July 15
summary: The July 15 Cash Shop update introduced the Lightning Surprise Style Box for all worlds through the July 22 maintenance. A single box costs 3,400 NX, an 11-box bundle costs 34,000 NX, and listed box items have a 90-day duration.

title: Try the Kinesis Demo!
summary: Global MapleStory released a browser-based Kinesis demo ahead of the character's upcoming revamp. It previews new skills and abilities, while warning that the demo's cooldown timing does not represent the final game balance.

title: Maple Memo: Addressing the Unique tier Familiar Boss Damage Potential
summary: Global MapleStory confirmed that Unique-tier Familiar Potential will keep only the 40% Boss Damage result at its current appearance rate. The team found that both the former 30% and 35% results had been removed, rather than only the intended 30% result.

title: MapleStory: Idle RPG June 11 Patch Notes
summary: The June 11 update added Hero's Journey, Guild Raid Horntail, chapters 39-41, Growth Dungeon stages, Hero Power Stage 8, costume search, summer events, new guild seasons, movement improvements, and a broad set of fixes.

title: MapleStory M Guide for New Maplers
summary: An official beginner reference for configuring the interface, using Auto-Battle, growing a character, handling equipment, trading through the Trade Station, and using convenience features.

title: Miracle Summer 2026
summary: Miracle Summer ran from June 26 through July 1, 2026 UTC. Each event day applied double Rank-Up chances to a different group of equipment slots.

title: June 25 - Temporary Maintenance
summary: MapleStory N published a June 25 temporary-maintenance notice on June 24 at 03:00 UTC. The current official page exposes only the label “msu direct” and contains no maintenance window, affected services, or change list that can be verified.

title: [COMPLETED] July 1 - Scheduled Maintenance
summary: MapleStory N marks its July 1 scheduled maintenance as completed. The current official page exposes only the label “MSU DIRECT”, so MPStorys cannot verify the maintenance window, affected systems, or completed changes beyond the title and publication record.

title: [Updated on July 6, 05:00(UTC)] Known Issues Following the July 1 Patch
summary: The MapleStory N July 1 known-issues notice records follow-up fixes through July 6. Tropical Adventure clear rewards increased from 50 to 100 coins, the level-160 Monster Park Express Pass issue was fixed, and Morass story-skip access was restored with an extra login-and-map step for earlier completions.

title: July 15 - Temporary Maintenance
summary: MapleStory N published a temporary-maintenance notice on July 15 at 23:00 UTC. The current official page exposes only the label “MSU Direct” and does not provide a maintenance window, affected services, or change list that MPStorys can verify.

title: Notice on Measures Regarding Arcane Catalyst
summary: MapleStory N blocked an Arcane Catalyst interaction that allowed symbols to be merged rather than transferred. Affected characters are being adjusted to retain the larger valid symbol amount, with eligible NESO refunds and a 50 Arcane Symbol Selector compensation package available through July 30.

title: [Complete] Maintenance - 2026 July 1
summary: MapleStory Worlds completed July 1 maintenance at 18:00 PDT after a three-hour platform outage. Version 26.5.5 added a Player Ban capability to World Insight, stabilized servers, and delivered editor, text rendering, state synchronization, and TeleportService fixes.

title: Open Market Store Process Abuse Sanction Post - June 2026
summary: MapleStory Worlds reported permanent account bans and currency retrieval for 509 accounts found to have abused open-market-store or payment processes during June 2026. The notice also explains where World Coin and in-World purchase refund requests must be submitted.

title: Avatar Product and Creator Sanction List - June 2026
summary: MapleStory Worlds published its June 2026 enforcement results for avatar products and creators that violated intellectual-property or platform policies. Confirmed products were permanently restricted, while creators received release, play, or cashout restrictions according to severity.

title: Global Creator Challenge Discord Linking Event
summary: Global Creator Challenge participants in the United States and Canada, excluding Quebec, can enter a Discord account-linking raffle through October 7, 2026. Six winners receive a one-month Claude Pro subscription by direct message from an official MapleStory Worlds administrator.

title: Hotfix Maintenance – 2026 July 2
summary: MapleStory Worlds scheduled a July 2 hotfix for the PC app while keeping the platform and apps available. Temporary disconnects could occur, and the update corrected custom-font rendering when RASTER or SMOOTH render modes were used.
